title: xanthophyllum longum
intro: Xanthophyllum longum, a plant species in the family Polygalaceae, is native to tropical Asia and is also known as the "long-stemmed Xanthophyllum". The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. Xanthophyllum longum has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
